## Resource search commands

Resource search commands.


### Search API

Search API.

**Usage:**

```
scw search resource search <query ...> [arg=value ...]
```


**Args:**

| Name |   | Description |
|------|---|-------------|
| query | Required | Search query |
| organization-id |  | Organization ID to use. If none is passed the default organization ID will be used |
